title: Guardians
description: Directory of parents and legal guardians linked to students at this institute

new.title: Add Guardian
new.description: Create a new guardian record. You can link this guardian to students after creation.
new.accessDenied: You do not have permission to create guardians

fieldDescriptions.phoneFormat: 10-digit Indian mobile, stored without country code

fieldHelp.educationLevelBody: The highest qualification the guardian has completed. Used for UDISE+ parent-education census and to tailor parent communication (e.g. sending PDF newsletters vs. audio bulletins). Only the category is stored — not the specific degree or university.
fieldHelp.educationLevelOptions: No formal education — never enrolled in school. Primary — up to Class 5. Secondary — Class 10 or 12 pass. Graduate — any 3 or 4 year bachelor's degree. Post-graduate — master's or above. Professional — MBBS, LLB, CA, and similar chartered qualifications.

errors.firstNameRequired: Please enter the guardian's first name
errors.lastNameRequired: Please enter the guardian's last name
errors.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid 10-digit Indian mobile number

filters.searchByNameOrPhone: Search by name or phone number

children.emptyDescription: Use the Link student button to attach this guardian to a student record.
children.count: {count, plural, one {# linked student} other {# linked students}}

linkDialog.title: Link a student
linkDialog.description: Attach this guardian to a student and record the relationship.
linkDialog.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or admission number
linkDialog.primaryWarning: If the selected student already has a primary contact, marking this guardian as primary will replace the existing one.

detail.notFoundDescription: This guardian record no longer exists or has been removed.

sidebar.primaryFor: {count, plural, one {Primary contact for # child} other {Primary contact for # children}}

profile.concurrencyError: Someone else modified this guardian. Refresh and try again.

consent.title: Consent status
consent.description: DPDP Act 2023 consent state per child per purpose
consent.todoNotice: Per-child consent matrix is shown on the consent dashboard

empty.title: No guardians yet
empty.description: Guardians are added when students are enrolled
empty.filteredDescription: Try a different name or phone number

accessDenied: You do not have permission to view guardians
